title: coussarea loftonii subsp. calimana
intro: Coussarea loftonii subsp. calimana is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly referred to as the coffee or madder family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coussarea loftonii subsp. calimana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
